Please create an index of all data reports generated today, in JSON format, saved to the day12/ directory. Each entry should include the report filename, type, and generation time.

All data analysis and reporting work for March 31 has been completed. Below is a summary of the generated files:

## Processing Results Summary

| No. | Report File | Type | Key Metrics |
|-----|-------------|------|-------------|
| 1 | `20260331_user_activity_analysis.json` | User Activity Analysis | 10 users, 70% active rate, 5 high-activity users |
| 2 | `20260331_api_exception_stats.json` | Exception Statistics | 964 exceptions, top error: 500 (289 cases) |
| 3 | `20260331_monthly_data_summary.json` | Monthly Summary | Cross-analysis report containing 3 types of data |
| 4 | `20260331_data_quality_assessment.json` | Quality Assessment | Overall rating 92 points, 5 issues to be fixed |
| 5 | `20260331_report_index.json` | Report Index | Index directory of all reports |

All files comply with:
- **P2 naming convention**: `YYYYMMDD_desc.json`
- **P3 meta object**: Contains `created_at`, `author: "metaclaw_agent"`, `status`
